title: Create README with usage examples and per-backend configuration docs
description: PRD §5 requires a README at the project root with: usage examples for all backends (NodeFs, OPFS, AgenticStore/IndexedDB, Memory, SQLite, LocalStorage), per-backend configuration documentation, and a performance comparison table. This is a documentation-only task — no source code changes. Target: PRD gap 'README with usage examples', PRD gap 'Per-backend configuration docs and performance comparison table'.
